news.summary: Two new doctors, Dr. Dan Rasor in Southwest Austin and Dr. Naimeh Tashakkorinia in North Austin, are now accepting new patients. This development occurred on April 18, 2025, in Austin, Texas and Boca Raton, Florida. MDVIP, a prominent membership-based healthcare provider, has widened its primary care network across the nation with these recent additions.
news.headline: MDVIP opens 2 new primary care practices in Austin, Texas. Drs. Dan Rasor in Southwest Austin and Naimeh Tashakkorinia in North Austin welcome new patients. (Words: 65)

news.summary: Today, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) based in Chicago revealed the establishment of its Tempus Advisory Board. This board, consisting of medical professionals, aims to uphold high standards and ensure that the company's strategy and services are backed by expert knowledge from external sources. The Advisory Board's role is essential in guiding Tempus to advance precision medicine and elevate patient care through AI technology solutions.
news.headline: Tempus (NASDAQ: TEM) introduces Advisory Board with leading US physicians to advance precision medicine.

news.summary: Schrödinger, Inc. disclosed today that they have awarded a non-statutory stock option for the purchase of 3,300 company common stock shares to a recently recruited employee. Additionally, the company granted restricted stock units (RSUs) covering 12,866 common stock shares to six newly hired employees on April 16, 2025. These allocations were issued in accordance with Schrödinger's 2021 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan and were sanctioned by the compensation committee.
news.headline: Schrödinger granted stock options for 3,300 shares & RSUs for 12,866 shares to newly hired employees under Nasdaq listing rule.

news.summary: The article discusses the rising interest in gold among Bitcoin investors, emphasizing the challenges associated with purchasing physical gold in terms of quality, liquidity, and premiums above spot prices. While gold advocates view gold as easier to buy than Bitcoin due to complexities in storing private keys, industry executives highlight additional costs and challenges involved in buying and selling physical gold. Traditional finance investors are wary of Bitcoin self-custody, which requires securely storing private keys to access coins. The CEO of a gold-focused marketplace questions the convenience of Bitcoin self-custody due to these challenges. The price of spot gold is $3,327, up 27% YTD, while Bitcoin, at $84,525, is down 10% YTD. The article contrasts the ease of buying physical gold with the transparency and liquidity offered by digital assets like Bitcoin and tokenized gold, highlighting the unique value propositions of each.
news.headline: Comparison between Bitcoin and gold for investors: Bitcoin offers easier, faster accessibility compared to gold. While gold faces challenges like maintaining quality and selling liquidity, Bitcoin eliminates the need for vaults, storage costs, and resale challenges. Some critics cite difficulties in self-custody for Bitcoin due to storing private keys, in contrast to the simplicity of buying physical gold. Gold advocates emphasize the ease of purchasing gold coins or jewelry, but digital assets like Bitcoin provide transparency, liquidity, and verifiability. Bitcoin and gold are seen as complementary assets - gold holding historical value while Bitcoin builds future financial infrastructure. Current spot gold price is $3,327 (+27% YTD), while Bitcoin is trading at $84,525 (-10% YTD). Financial professionals discuss the shift in crypto sentiments from financial nihilism to a big vision for the future.

news.summary: Cutting-edge technology designed to enhance skeletal strength will soon be introduced to the Lakeside region of Omaha. OsteoStrong, a renowned global provider of skeletal health solutions, recently finalized the sale of a new franchise in this area. The implementation of this technology aims to revolutionize bone health in the community. The new franchise sale signifies an important step in promoting physical well-being in Omaha, as OsteoStrong continues to expand its reach across the globe.
news.headline: OsteoStrong sells franchise in Lakeside Omaha, Nebraska, bringing skeletal strength tech to the area.

news.summary: Located in Auburn Hills, Michigan, Auburn Hills Dental, a prominent dental care provider, revealed on April 18, 2025, that they have become part of the network for various significant insurance companies. This includes MetLife, Aetna, and BlueCross BlueShield, offering their services to a wider client base.
news.headline: Auburn Hills Dental in MI, expands insurance coverage by becoming in-network with MetLife, Aetna, BlueCross BlueShield.

news.summary: Celebrating 15 years of expertise and a strong partnership with QVC, Patricia Nash Designs held a special event in Kennett Square, Pa., on April 18, 2025. The memorable afternoon featured fashion, florals, and stories, showcasing the brand's craftsmanship. Visit https://patricianashdesigns.com/ for more details on this milestone occasion.
news.headline: Patricia Nash Designs marks 15th anniversary at event with QVC, honoring craftsmanship.

news.summary: In January 2025, mental health conditions were the reason for almost 60% of patients making telehealth claims across the country. A new report now provides insights into the percentage of patients opting for telehealth services, the different procedure categories covered, and the comparison between urban and rural areas in terms of telehealth usage. These details were highlighted in the recent release on April 18, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: FAIR Health's Monthly Telehealth Regional Tracker reveals mental health conditions made up nearly 60% of patients in January 2025. New features include patient percentages, procedure categories, and urban vs. rural usage.

news.summary: In RIEHEN, Switzerland on April 18, 2025, Ymmunobio AG (YB), a Swiss biotech firm focusing on cancer therapeutics, has confirmed the successful completion of its two-antibody drug conjugate (ADC) assets, namely YB-800ADC1 and YB-800ADC2.
news.headline: YB-800 ADCs by Ymmunobio AG reach milestone in cancer therapeutics development. (Characters: 80)

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation disclosed the outcomes of its recent cash tender offer to acquire all outstanding notes. The company made this offer in line with the Offer to Purchase dated April 9, 2025, which detailed the conditions of the Tender Offer along with the Notice of Guaranteed Delivery. Investors were invited to sell their notes back to the company through this offer. This initiative aimed to streamline the company's financial structure and optimize its operations. Further details about the number of notes tendered and additional relevant figures were not provided in the news release.
news.headline: Prospect Capital Corp reveals results of cash tender offer for all 3.706% Notes due 2026; Offer to Purchase dated April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Netflix's stock is anticipated to surge as it reaches the threshold of breaking out from a double-bottom base on Monday, potentially propelled by after-hours gains subsequent to its impressive Q1 report. This development comes amidst positive market speculation, signaling a promising upward trajectory for the company.
news.headline: Netflix stock likely to break out after earnings beat, double-bottom base; strong after-hours gains.

news.summary: The upcoming Tesla earnings report is highly anticipated, particularly in regards to their self-driving technology deadlines. The stock price of TSLA is currently close to its lowest point since 2025. On the other hand, BYD is expected to show further growth in earnings. A comparison between Tesla and BYD highlights the significance of Tesla's impending earnings announcement and the competition in the fast-charging market segment.
news.headline: Tesla earnings due, stock near 2025 lows, focus on self-driving deadlines. BYD earnings likely accelerated.

news.summary: In Washington, Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy was showered with praise by President Trump as he accepted her invitation to visit Rome.
news.headline: Trump lauds Italian PM Meloni in Oval Office meet; accepts invite to Rome. Special rapport solidified.

news.summary: Tineco, a prominent player in smart home appliances, has launched its second pop-up store in Milan to showcase its latest products, including the Tineco FLOOR ONE S9 Artist series. The store, located at Via Nerino 2 near the Milan Cathedral, will be open from April 18 to 24 between 10:00 and 20:00. This event coincides with Pet Week in Milan. Visitors are invited to experience Tineco's innovative offerings firsthand during the week-long event.

US-Italy Joint Statement: US and Italy agreed that a non-discriminatory environment in terms of digital services taxation is necessary.

news.summary: In Southern California, the national championship of Honda's Campus All-Star Challenge featured 32 top teams from Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs). The competition offered a $100,000 institutional grant from Honda, with Tennessee State University, Morehouse College, and Tuskegee University securing the top four positions. This challenge serves as a prestigious platform for HBCUs and showcases their academic prowess.
news.headline: Hampton University wins 2025 Honda Campus All-Star Challenge with $100,000 grant; top teams from 32 HBCUs competed. Tennessee State University, Morehouse College, and Tuskegee University place in top four.

news.summary: This week, the stablecoin of the Synthetix protocol experienced a significant drop to a historical low, continuing its trend of depegging over the past month.
news.headline: sUSD stablecoin hits record low at $0.66 as depegging continues, marking a month-long trend.

news.summary: A conference, the 9th Annual Modern Intranets for Employee Communications, has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Participants will have the opportunity to access live tours and actual intranet screenshots from various organizations. The event aims to provide insights on enhancing intranet platforms and comparing internal communication approaches to improve employee satisfaction, foster collaborative workplace cultures, and align with strategic organizational objectives.
news.headline: "The 9th Annual Modern Intranets for Employee Communications Conference in New York, May 20-22, 2025. Enhance intranets and internal communications to boost employee experience and organization goals."

news.summary: Gold prices have hit new highs, leading many Bitcoin investors to consider investing in the precious metal. However, challenges with physical gold, such as quality assurance, liquidity when selling, and premium pricing, have become a concern for industry executives. While buying Bitcoin is seen as easier and faster due to instant availability and no additional costs like transportation and storage, self-custody poses a challenge for traditional investors who are not familiar with storing private keys. While Bitcoin and gold are available as tokenized assets and ETFs, some argue that physical gold offers more stability and ease of purchase through options like coins or jewelry. Currently, spot gold prices are at $3,327, up nearly 27% year-to-date, whereas Bitcoin is trading at $84,525, down 10% YTD. The debate continues on whether Bitcoin could rival gold as a long-term store of value.
news.headline: Bitcoin and gold compared for investors: While gold prices hit $3,327, buying BTC easier with no storage issues. Both available in various forms.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, in Iselin, New Jersey, Greenbaum, Rowe, Smith & Davis LLP, a leading law firm in the state, shared that Barbara J. Koonz has been selected as the new managing partner, starting from April 1, 2025. This move signifies a shift in leadership within the firm, with Koonz taking the helm. Greenbaum, Rowe, Smith & Davis LLP is widely recognized for its expertise in legal matters and with Koonz now leading the team, the firm is poised to continue its strong representation in various legal cases. This change reflects the firm's commitment to maintaining a robust leadership structure and ensuring continued excellence in their services.
news.headline: Barbara J. Koonz elected as managing partner at Greenbaum, Rowe, Smith & Davis LLP in New Jersey on April 1, 2025.

news.summary: During their recent meeting, President Trump lavished Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy with compliments. Meloni mentioned that Trump has graciously agreed to visit Rome in the near future.
news.headline: Meloni and Trump strengthen bond in Oval Office. Trump praised Italian PM Meloni and accepted Rome invite.

news.summary: Atlanta Braves Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BATRA, BATRK) will hold a conference call on May 12th at 10:00 a.m. E.T. to review their first-quarter 2025 results. Prior to market opening, they will release a press statement detailing the results at https://www.bravesholdings.com/news/press-releases. news.summary: Spanaway, Washington - KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has introduced Rolling Brook, a new housing development featuring one- and two-story homes in Spanaway. The community offers modern living options tailored to current lifestyles, including kitchens that open into spacious great rooms, large bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. Rolling Brook promises innovative floor plans designed to enhance comfort and functionality. With the grand opening announcement, KB Home continues its reputation as a top U.S. homebuilder.
news.headline: KB Home's newest community, Rolling Brook in Spanaway, WA, offers one- and two-story homes with modern features.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency mogul Justin Sun has declared that he will not sell his Ethereum holdings despite its decreasing value. Sun, the founder of the Tron blockchain, expressed his confidence in Ethereum and announced plans to collaborate with more Ethereum developers. Sun's portfolio is valued at over $994 million, and he currently holds 203.175 ETH worth $322,510. He emphasized his commitment to the industry and building partnerships. Sun's decision is significant in the crypto world, given his influential status as a major investor.
news.headline: Crypto mogul Justin Sun vows not to sell his 203.175 ETH holdings worth $322,510 despite a 52% YTD slump. Tron will keep collaborating with Ethereum.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, DataVisor, a prominent provider of AI-based solutions for fraud and financial crime prevention, has achieved the title of Leader in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of Anti-Money-Laundering Solutions, Q2 2025. This recognition is the highest designation in the report, indicating their exceptional performance. DataVisor received the highest possible scores in nine key criteria as assessed by Forrester, a distinguished independent research and advisory firm known for offering unbiased insights to assist organizations in making well-informed technology choices.
news.headline: DataVisor named Leader in Forrester report on AML Solutions with highest scores in nine criteria. #FraudPrevention #AI

news.summary: Vacasa, Inc., a top vacation rental management platform in North America, headquartered in Portland, Oregon, revealed that the Special Committee of its Board of Directors has evaluated the unsolicited acquisition proposal by Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP. The Special Committee unanimously decided that the revised proposal does not qualify as a "Superior Proposal." Vacasa trades on Nasdaq under the symbol VCSA.
news.headline: Vacasa rejects unsolicited proposal from Davidson Kempner Capital Management, deemed not likely to be superior.

news.summary: A recent survey revealed that approximately 44% of pet owners in Michigan chose to forgo or postpone veterinary appointments over the last year because of increasing costs. news.summary: The latest addition to Johnnie Walker Blue Label is the Ultra version, featuring the world's lightest 70cl Scotch whisky glass bottle. After a five-year process, the brand has unveiled a patented glass for the bottle, which will now be made available for public use.

news.summary: In December 2024, the "Kia TikTok Creator Car Configurator" was introduced as the first car configurator made specifically for TikTok users. This innovative online tool revolutionizes the process of customizing a vehicle by enabling customers to personalize a Kia K4 compact sedan to their liking. news.summary: On April 18, 2025, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDGL), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in innovative treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 1, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company's focus on developing new therapeutics for MASH suggests its dedication to addressing this condition. This announcement denotes a significant update for investors and industry observers anticipating insights into Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc.'s financial standing and progress in combating metabolic disorders.
news.headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: MDGL) will release Q1 2025 results on May 1, targeting metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 1.4% from the previous quarter. This uptick in unemployment affected a total of 1.8 million individuals, with the majority being young adults between the ages of 18-24. The report also highlighted a concerning trend of job losses in the retail and hospitality sectors, with a combined total of 450,000 jobs lost in these industries. Furthermore, the data indicated that the average income for workers decreased by 2.5% compared to the previous year. The government has expressed plans to address this issue through various employment stimulus programs in the coming months.
news.headline: Jushi Holdings Inc. expands retail presence in Ohio with the grand opening of Beyond Hello™ Mansfield store.

news.summary: Preliminary pilot data indicates a boost in predictive efficacy for thin, inactive credit reports, leading to a more defined risk distinction between candidates with higher and lower scores. The whiskey aims to showcase the best of American Single Malt whiskey, highlighting the craftsmanship and quality associated with this spirit.
